items.title: Alfonso Ribeiro Shares Photo of His ‘Last Moment’ with James Van Der Beek: ‘I Really Miss Him Already’
items.description: Ribeiro remembered the emotional moment with Van Der Beek, who died on Feb. 11 at the age of 48

items.title: Taylor Swift Shares Cheeky Nod to Her Lyrics as She Congratulates Breezy Johnson on Her  Olympics Engagement
items.description: Johnson's now-fiancé Connor Watkins popped the question at the finish line of the women's Super-G event in Cortina

items.title: Cody Ko and Wife Kelsey Kreppel Are Expecting Baby No. 2 (Exclusive)
items.description: The couple is already parents to a son, whom they welcomed in 2024

items.title: Andy Cohen Says Savannah Guthrie’s “Today”  Colleagues Are ‘Somber and Sad’ amid Her Mom’s Disappearance (Exclusive)
items.description: The 'Today' anchor's mother Nancy was abducted from her home early on Feb. 1, according to authorities

items.title: Police Investigating Nancy Guthrie's Disappearance Have Recovered 'Gloves' and Other Evidence
items.description: Investigators are tracking more clues in their desperate search to find Nancy Guthrie, who vanished in the early morning hours of Feb. 1
